title: centaurea scopulorum var. scopulorum
intro: Centaurea scopulorum var. scopulorum, commonly known as mountain centaury, is a type of flowering plant in the aster family, Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Centaurea scopulorum var. scopulorum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
